fields.label: Display Name
fields.description: Name shown to users in the chat UI (e.g. Nuerix, brAIn, Your Company AI)

fields.label: AI Provider
fields.options:
Anthropic (Claude)
OpenAI
Neurix (Local AI)
OpenAI Compatible

fields.label: Nuerix Engine
fields.options:
Falcon
Falcon Pro
Kiwi
Kiwi Pro
Swift
Swift Pro
Storm
Atlas
Mint
fields.description: Choose your Nuerix engine. Falcon = fastest, Kiwi = most accurate.

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Only needed for custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

fields.label: Max Tool Iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of tool calls per conversation turn (default 10)

fields.label: Temperature
fields.description: Lower = more focused (0.0–1.0). Recommended: 0.1 for ERP tasks.

fields.label: Context Status
fields.description: Nuerix pre-builds a compact knowledge snapshot of your company data before answering queries.

fields.label: Custom Context (Optional)
fields.description: Add anything Nuerix should always know: your company speciality, key contacts, business rules, product lines, etc. This is injected into every query.

fields.label: Enable Audit Trail
fields.description: Log all conversations, tool calls, and data access. Required for 21 CFR Part 11.

fields.label: Data Retention (Days)
fields.description: Audit logs retained for this many days (2555 = 7 years, FDA minimum). After this period records are anonymized.

fields.label: Require Reason for Write Actions
fields.description: Prompt user to provide a reason before AI creates, updates, or deletes records.

fields.label: Data Classification
fields.description: Classification label applied to all audit log entries.

fields.label: GDPR Data Controller Name
fields.description: Organisation responsible for personal data (GDPR Art. 4)

fields.options:
brAIn / Nuerix — AI intelligence layer for Styloworld.
Local engine (Nuerix): set Base URL to http://localhost:11434/v1, model to qwen2.5:3b.
For Anthropic Claude, get your API key from console.anthropic.com.

21 CFR Part 11: Enable Audit Trail to record all interactions with tamper-evident hash chaining.
GDPR: Use Brain → GDPR Tools to export or anonymize user data.
